The Control and Visuals are very worst. Please dont waste money on it.
I wasted 15 dollars on this, the serve is buns, the bots are outrageous and you can't even sprint and the graphics are ahh, if you don't want to get a headache, please just don't buy this game
I feel I wasted my money. I dont like it. Its hard to play. Its definitely something I've tried and dont like the movements. Can't even see the birdie most times. Dont like the serve option either.
When I loaded in I could play if u want to play a good badminton game then don’t buy this
Dont even download this game. Its not free cant even play without playing

reviews.review_title: Less of a game, more of a scam
reviews.review_description: Pretends to be a free game and then hits you with a paywall before you can sample it, and doesn't enable automated refunds.  Makes total sense when you get to experience what they're offering - no one would willing want to pay for this.
Wasted £10 just to be in a crappy pixelated horrible game do not buy

No way I have to download the game to get flashed in the face by some dumb wall saying I have to buy the game. The worst thing is that it probably sucks too because it’s made with unity so just shut down the game if nobody plays it. This game is a$$

Didnt i just waste 30 dollars, and your telling me that if i already bought the 30 dollars version i wouldnt get charged for the 20 dollar version, well guess what? I was charged, and first of all the physics is so horrible, like the power of when you hit the shuttle is so weak, and the shuttle didnt even go out and still calling it a foul, and the graphics, like why is it 30 dollars when the graphics aint good. This game is basically scam minigames.
Whatever you do do not buy this crap spend 30$ on this game poor quality terrible animation and lame gamemodes . DON'T FALL FOR IT!!!!!!!
U get charged an extra  $14 plus tax
Why make the game free, instead of wasting my time for it to cost money when you load up the game, a tenner for that.? Not worth the purchase.

I thought there would atleast be a free demo before having to pay to play - there's not ! 

The physics are TERRIBLE . No matter how hard you hit the shuttle barely moves , and even if it does it stops mid air and drops . 

This game is not worth it at all - im now having to get support to refund as its saying I played for more than 2 hours / purchased over 2 weeks ago . I most definitely did not !!
As above
U have to pay to get into the game, despite it being free. Was exited to try too.
You have you by the game when you load into it. Also rlly pixlated

please don’t buy this i spend 15 pounds on this and it’s garbage
You get hyped for a fun free game then it just hits you with a thing that says you have to buy it. Waste of time and money.
Very poor quality application. Pro version is not working..refund is not possible..strongly recommend to remove this application from store
WhatsApp a trash app, no cashback

I wasted 20 $ on this crappy glichy  stupid game.  Do not buy this vr  game , and if you do you CANT REFUND IT . Waste of money Don’t buy it I’m begging you . If I could give this zero stars I would.  spend your money on something else.
the game is not letting me get in the game
This game is so asss even my dog said so.
This game is useless, full of glitches and impossible to even learn how to play. And there are no refunds on this game, so I’ve wasted my money!
You can download it for free but as soon as you get in the game you have to pay to play the actual game. 😡😡

Please do not waste money
This game is trash

Dont buy this

dude I can’t even exit the bundle bro it’s unplayable
I love it🥰

reviews.review_title: Says free but the app is blocked
reviews.review_description: App is marked free but no activity in the app is free. On launch, you see a popup for the purchase and you cannot get past it without paying. Free apps should have basic functionality for free. Waste of time.

I downloaded this, thinking it was free (made no mention to price) after seeing the TikToks. Went to play it, only to be hit with the $12 cost that was hidden. I wasn’t sure if this was a glitch or something, so I spoke to the dev. He called me broke and was generally being rude. (posted a screenshot on my TikTok @benjamknwhitten) He also accused me of working together with another person who he tried to scam. Please don’t download, will only waste time and storage.

developer_response.body: Hi There, as everyone can see you didn't say anything about the gameplay as you never played it yes the game cost $11.99, it's quite obvious when you open the game. We looked into your conversations with the "dev" in question and it turns out you are a 12 year kid who can't take a joke. And you only want to advertise your TikTok as you have no shame that you literally tagged it in your review. Anyway, have a nice day! And do better!

reviews.review_description: Nicely dm’d him after confusion and creator proceeded to ask if I was poor and if was slow and if I was stupid

The latest update to this game has transformed it remarkably. Previous issues with physics that hindered gameplay have been effectively rectified. The new physics engine delivers smooth, realistic movements, greatly enhancing the overall gaming experience. 
To bad I had to pay another extra $9.99 but is all good though 👍

reviews.review_title: Just be faster. Or better in general.
reviews.review_description: I play this game often, and I love it. Great graphics, game play is intuitive, as is the user interface. Now, I will say, when you get into the game, there is a gigantic wall of "buy me!" (As there bloody well should be because people spent a lot of time and effort on that and I don't think $11 is a lot to ask) and once that wall comes up, that's basically what you're going to be looking at until you exit/reopen or surrender/ pay up. HOWEVER, you have a window of about 3/4 of a second BEFORE that screen shows up to select your gameplay. You just gotta be quick. Frankly, if you aren't fast enough to beat that ad screen, you never stood a chance against 'Ben' anyways. And that's how we weed out the weak in the bloodsport that is Badminton ✊🤘🤘👅

First of all, this game is visually beautiful, I could never imagine playing Badminton like this. 

Nice physics and all in all nice game, played it for more than an hour straight.
Great game it's not free, still costs $9.99. I went in with low expectations but was impressed in the end.
Terrible game and won’t let me refund cause you buy it through in app purchases

They will force you to buy the game as soon as you open it. And after that, you can't play the game! It's just too hard and complicated for a game like this. They also don't offer any refund. DON'T BUY IT.
It' totally a scam and cannot refund
Don't buy it!

The game is a complete scam, it's advertised as free, advertised as being a good game, then when you get into it you're charged €10 when it's on sale or Normally €30, you play the game, realise it's bad, then you can't refund it because it's technically an in-app purchase, nasty stuff

developer_response.body:
OK, Conor, we don't appreciate slanders as we checked and you never even played the game so you don't even know if it's bad yes the game is still in development so it's not perfect. We wanted to ignore your review but it turns out many people who downloaded it and never actually played it are following your footsteps like an NPC all saying the same thing, we appreciate honest reviews but this isn't one.

Also, the game has been on the App Lab seen 2021 it cost $30 and sold well over 1,000 copies it was way worse back then, and even then the game had a less than 20% return rate every month, so now we acquired it we wanted to put the game on sale, unfortunately, Meta doesn't let App Lab games have the option to go on sale on the store so that's why we did the sale the way we did and we didn't know players couldn't refund. 

We now understand that could be a problem for some users, but if you can't afford it and never played there is no need to write a review as it is misleading and very disingenuous. If you want a way to try it for free and couldn't afford it you could have sent us an email or joined our Discord and talked with us and we would look into it.

Hope you have a great day!

reviews.review_description:
I can actually use this to become a Badminton Pro!

Sweet!

I cannot request a refund for a horrible game (since it was sold as an add-on). As a real-life badminton player, this is just the worst. It's a very scammy method to get money. Get this app off the store now. I’m sure all the positive reviews were faked, I can’t imagine giving this barely functional thing anything more other than 1 star.

Please ignore the developer comment, I’ll gladly provide anyone with proof of my 11,99 payment.


Also, I’m member number 51448521 of the BE Badminton Federation. So stop trying to discredit the bad reviews.

DO NOT BUY

developer_response.body:
Hey There, why do you want to request a refund when you never even bought it, you literally downloaded it to rate it one star. All the one-star ratings are from fake players who never actually played the game and claim they did, and it is getting annoying at this point, so please stop lying as we do not appreciate liars and we like an honest review this one isn't one and it's even worse "as a real-life badminton player" to get some kind of credibility very diabolical.

You can reach out to us via Discord or Email.

Don't be an NPC like other one-star reviews do better!

reviews.review_description: While going through negative comments from other users, I decided to download the game to form my own opinion. I believe those who gave it a one-star rating were dishonest as they claimed to have tested the game when, in fact, they didn't even bother to do so, simply stating that it was not good. On my end, I didn't have the opportunity to assess the game's quality because, upon installation, it prompts for payment. There isn't even an option to play a free version to determine if the game is worth purchasing, despite your announcement claiming it is free in the store. This approach appears unfair to me, which is why I'm giving it a one-star rating. If possible, I wouldn't hesitate to give it zero stars.

I bought the game earlier this year for $30, the physics was terrible and I felt like it was too expensive, and the game felt abandoned as there were no updates, but I just read an article on the store page from the devs it turns out the old company has been acquired and there are new devs now. And I am kinda happy with this new update. And the game is now free to download but you still have to buy it later for $9.99 I believe, which kinda sucks if you've bought it before for $30, the game is much better now though, physics is finally very realistic. I would advise trying out for sure.

Really nice workout game I played Badminton when I was younger, It's nice to see it go digital in the VR world and now I can play it anywhere even while sitting. I am glad!

Definitely getting it for my kids!

Am so glad I held off buying the game due to the bad reviews it was just too expensive at the time, I just got it a couple of hours ago and I can say for fact it is pretty good. Stunning graphics the environment looks very beautiful, great physics too. Would recommend.

FYI the game is actually not free you will have to buy it from inside the game, this wasn't a deal breaker though at least for me.

reviews.review_title: Thank God I didn't buy this game earlier
reviews.review_description:
So I really wanted a good Badminton game but the $30 price tag mixed with the bad reviews scared me away but I kept a close watch now the game is now free to download but you will have to pay  $9.99 to access the full game but I was ready to risk it. The game is very good actually, I never tried the old version so I can't tell the difference I am just glad I got it for cheap.

Overall, will recommend it!
OK, loved it. Best $9.99 I have ever spent on a social sports game before. I am impressed and I can't wait to see more updates.

I finally downloaded this game for free, I had fun playing and it was great, I never bought the game all this time due to the $30 price tag. 

I had to read the reviews many of them are from a year to 2 years ago. And the other latest bad reviews are from people who are disgruntled about the fact they got it for $29.99 and had to pay an extra $9.99 which I understand, but its speaks nothing about how the game is now.

I never tried the previous updates, but I do like the game and would love to see the developers keep releasing more and more updates, but for now will recommend.

I played it for a couple of hours and can see myself coming back.

That's all I have to say for now bye!
